title: Create: Uncraftables Automation
description: This Create mod addon adds crafting recipes for sand and clay made basically from water and cobblestone with a multi-step process.
body:
‎ 
![Mixers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/965c52c75845ca155a0b29df22806e13eef42802_0.webp)









‎ 
**Create: Uncraftables Automated**



This Create mod addon adds crafting recipes for sand and clay made basically from water and cobblestone with a multi-step process.                                                               
  
  **Current recipes added ->**
  - Slimeballs
  - Clay
  - Sand
  - Polished Rose Quartz

------------------------------------------------------------------------
**Sand process ->**


First you gotta get pebbles.

To get pebbles you have to crush/millstone rocks

To get rocks you have to smelt cobbelstone

Now add pebbles with 150mb of water in a basin, and mix

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/043e0d70c308f4bc590b796569cc9f236e83e295_0.webp)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------






**Clay process ->**



First you gotta get pebbles

To get pebbles you have to crush/millstone rocks

To get rocks you have to smelt cobbelstone

Now add rocks, pebbles and 100mb of water in a basin and mix


![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52699aff5e97f9ba750465fdf3d944a18867b5a2.png)



-----------------------------------------------
**Slimeball process ->**


For slimeballs you are gonna need to mix 500mb of water and 1 tube of activator
  
To get activator craft 1 slimeball, and 1 crushed glass powder

To get crushed glass powder run normal glass through crafting and there you have it

When mixing activator and 500mb of water, you gain 2 slimeballs

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/baa138f246b66223fe815fed0d0dc41cab9f80e2.png)
---------------------------------------------------
**Polished Rose Quartz process ->**

For polished rose quartz you need to crush rose quartz into crushed rose quartz

With crushed rose quartz you have to deploy it into a cube mold

To get a cube mold you have to craft 5 cobblestone into unfinished cube mold, and blast it

After deploying crushed rose quartz into a cube mold, press it once then you gain one polished 
rose quartz

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/60cd74d5ecdc36653bf90b24c1fc5eebf0a4f251.png)
